title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 24th February 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Wait for dip to ~1175; no hurry to buy at ~1310
recommendations.detail: The stock ran from around Rs 750 (after a dip to 650) up to Rs 1450-1475 and is now near Rs 1310. Kutumba Rao said to wait patiently rather than chase it; around Rs 1175 is a good consolidation point at which to buy. He framed it as a 'yes or no' - no need to buy in a hurry.

recommendations.note: Book partial profits; momentum revives only on a fresh high
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao said L&T Finance performed extraordinarily and peaked around Rs 320, so book partial profits from here. Momentum returns only if it crosses a fresh high. He expects the gold-lending tailwind to fade as gold volatility peaks and margin/repayment pressures build in FY26-27, so the top line may moderate.

recommendations.note: Hold per last result; corrected from ~54-55 to 42-43
recommendations.detail: Asked by a caller at a 15% loss, Kutumba Rao said hold Sagility. The last result supports holding the stock; it weakened along with the broader market, having attempted ~54-55 recently before correcting to 42-43. The company is in a good sector/space.
